Name: FTableRowStyle
Description: Represents the appearance of an STableRow

Variables.Name: SelectorFocusedBrush
Variables.Description: Brush used as a selector when a row is focused

Variables.Name: ActiveHoveredBrush
Variables.Description: Brush used when a selected row is active and hovered

Variables.Name: ActiveBrush
Variables.Description: Brush used when a selected row is active

Variables.Name: InactiveHoveredBrush
Variables.Description: Brush used when a selected row is inactive and hovered

Variables.Name: InactiveBrush
Variables.Description: Brush used when a selected row is inactive

Variables.Name: EvenRowBackgroundHoveredBrush
Variables.Description: Brush used when an even row is hovered

Variables.Name: EvenRowBackgroundBrush
Variables.Description: Brush used when an even row is in its normal state

Variables.Name: OddRowBackgroundHoveredBrush
Variables.Description: Brush used when an odd row is hovered

Variables.Name: OddRowBackgroundBrush
Variables.Description: Brush to used when an odd row is in its normal state

Variables.Name: TextColor
Variables.Description: Text color used for all rows

Variables.Name: SelectedTextColor
Variables.Description: Text color used for the selected row

Variables.Name: DropIndicator_Above
Variables.Description: Brush used to provide feedback that a user can drop above the hovered row.

Variables.Name: DropIndicator_Onto
Variables.Description: Brush used to provide feedback that a user can drop onto the hovered row.

Variables.Name: DropIndicator_Below
Variables.Description: Brush used to provide feedback that a user can drop below the hovered row.
